title: abutilon sepalum
intro: Abutilon sepalum, also known as the Country Mallow or Indian Mallow, is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Abutilon sepalum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it has also been used as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Abutilon sepalum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine practices.
